# Kraken split fixture (milestone 1.5, P-002).
# ONE te3 state (mith-158276-TE3 puzzle #2 of the committed subset, basics
# played out) that contains kraken fish of BOTH types under the all-steps
# kraken parameters of the harness test (size 2..4, max 2 fins, 0 endo fins,
# basic+franken): 22 Type 1 and 179 Type 2 steps at harvest time.
# Format: library state line (:0000:x:grid:deleted-candidates::), parsed by
# Sudoku2.setSudoku(). See KrakenSplitFixtureTest.
